name: FaceFinder
description: « Send a photo of a face to find potential profiles on social networks and websites, verify an identity, detect a fake profile, or identify unauthorized use of your images

name: 2 VIDEO
description: « Quickly generate clips from text or images by choosing the duration, format, and style. Several professional AI templates are available to create HD videos ready to be shared or integrated into your projects

name: GLM 5
description: « This 745B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model aims for complete agentic intelligence with planning, tools, web browsing, and context up to 200K tokens, while being published under an MIT license

name: BigIdeasDB
description: « An AI-powered platform that analyzes millions of Reddit posts, G2 reviews, Capterra feedback, Upwork jobs, and app store reviews to help entrepreneurs discover validated startup ideas, plan products, and build with confidence using proven market demand

name: Edubrain AI
description: « Solve your homework problems by getting detailed, step-by-step answers. Upload a question or photo and receive a clear solution in math, science, history, or literature

name: Filmpitch
description: « This platform helps filmmakers turn a short summary into a real film project. You enter your idea and the AI creates a logline, a detailed synopsis, character sheets, a visual mood board, and a pitch deck ready to be presented

name: Lullaby.ink
description: « Write and illustrate personalized books in minutes, with automatic layout and cover included. Ideal for creating children's stories, customized gifts, or print-ready stories

name: Seedance 2.0
description: « Create complete videos from a simple sentence using AI. You can combine up to 12 references (9 images, 3 videos, 3 audio clips of up to 15 seconds) to maintain character consistency. The tool generates videos lasting 5 to 12 seconds in 720p-1080p resolution

name: Claude Code
description: « Work with Claude directly in your code base from the terminal, VS Code, JetBrains, or the web. It understands your entire project, makes multi-file changes, and uses your CLI tools to build, test, and deploy

name: GPT-5.3-Codex
description: « An autonomous coding agent that works for hours on complex projects. You can interact with it in real time while it codes, tests, and deploys your applications. It outperforms all models on SWE-Bench Pro and Terminal-Bench 2.0 while being 25% faster

name: GLM-OCR
description: « Extract text from any image with this AI-powered optical character recognition. The tool understands semantic context and preserves document structure. It outperforms Tesseract on handwriting and low-quality images

name: Claude Opus 4.6
description: « Anthropic's most powerful model, capable of handling contexts of 1 million tokens and reasoning adaptively. It coordinates multiple agents in parallel to solve complex tasks. You control the level of effort, intelligence, or cost with 4 available settings

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
